parameters.queryString: ='{{ $('Parse Image Specs').item.json.folder_id }}' in parents and name = '{{ $('Parse Image Specs').item.json.source_filename }}' and trashed = false

parameters.jsCode:
// Read the current row from the sheet
const row = $json;

const topic = row['Topic'] || '';
const keyword = row['Target Keyword'] || '';
const clientFocus = row['Client Focus'] || 'All';
const funnelStage = row['Funnel Stage'] || 'MOFU';

// Build the generator prompt
const prompt = `You are a senior content writer for DiMag, an AI-first digital marketing agency based in Bangalore serving clients across India, USA, GCC and Europe in healthcare, D2C ecommerce, B2B SaaS, retail, hyperlocal services and education.

Write a complete, publish-ready, SEO-optimized blog post on the topic and target keyword provided.

The audience is business owners and decision-makers evaluating how to grow through digital marketing.

The goal is to rank in search, demonstrate DiMag's expertise and build trust with potential clients.

TOPIC: ${topic}

TARGET KEYWORD: ${keyword}

CLIENT FOCUS: ${clientFocus}

FUNNEL STAGE: ${funnelStage}

OUTPUT FORMAT (FOLLOW EXACTLY)

=== SEO METADATA ===
SEO_TITLE: [Compelling title under 60 characters, include the target keyword, end with | Dimag]
META_DESC: [Under 155 characters, include the target keyword, action-oriented]
URL_SLUG: [Lowercase hyphenated slug from keyword]
FEATURED_ALT: [Descriptive alt text for the hero image]
FEATURED_LINK: https://dimag.agency
=== END METADATA ===

[H1] Blog Title

Opening section:
Write 2 to 3 short paragraphs that:
- Identify the problem
- Explain the business impact
- Preview what the article will cover
- Include the target keyword naturally in the first paragraph

[H2] First Main Section

2 to 4 paragraphs of detailed, practical advice.

[[IMAGE_1|descriptive keyword-rich alt text|https://dimag.agency]]

[H2] Second Main Section

Detailed content.

[H2] Third Main Section

Detailed content.

[[IMAGE_2|descriptive keyword-rich alt text|https://dimag.agency]]

[H2] Additional Sections As Needed

Create enough sections to fully cover the topic.

Use [H3] headings whenever explaining:
- Processes
- Frameworks
- Checklists
- Methodologies
- Step-by-step implementation

Example:

[H3] Step 1: Define Campaign Objectives

[H3] Step 2: Build Audience Segments

[H2] How DiMag Can Help

Write one helpful paragraph connecting the topic to DiMag's expertise.
Keep it credible and educational, not salesy.

[H2] Frequently Asked Questions

Q1. Question

A. Answer

Q2. Question

A. Answer

Q3. Question

A. Answer

Q4. Question

A. Answer

Q5. Question

A. Answer

Q6. Question

A. Answer

CONTENT REQUIREMENTS

- Use 5 to 8 meaningful H2 sections.
- Every H2 must provide a unique insight.
- Avoid generic headings such as Introduction, Overview, Benefits or Conclusion.
- Include the target keyword or a close variation in at least 2 H2 headings.
- Use 2 to 4 image markers throughout the article.
- Every section must provide practical, actionable advice.
- Write 1400 to 1800 words.

STRICT WRITING RULES

- Never use Markdown headings (#, ##, ###).
- Use only [H1], [H2] and [H3] markers.
- The article title must begin with [H1].
- Every major section must begin with [H2].
- Use [H3] only where it improves clarity.
- Never use em dash or en dash.
- Never use the Oxford comma.
- Never use emojis.
- Never fabricate statistics, percentages or study results.
- Never put a year in the SEO title or headings unless the topic is date-specific.
- Write in clear professional prose.
- Avoid bullet point spam.
- Be specific and practical.
- Write like an experienced consultant, not a generic AI writer.
- Output ONLY the blog.
- Do not include explanations, notes or commentary outside the article.`;

return [{
  json: {
    prompt: prompt,
    topic: topic,
    keyword: keyword,
    row_number: row.row_number
  }
}];
